section_title: The principal must make compensation to his agent in respect of injury
content:
225. The principal must make compensation to his agent in respect of injury
to agent for
caused to such agent by the principal's neglect or want of skill.
injury
caused by
Illustration
principal's
neglect A employs B as a bricklayer in building a house, and puts up the scaffolding
himself. The scaffolding is unskilfully put up, and B is in consequence hurt. A
must make compensation to B.
Effect of agency on contract with third persons
Enforcement
